# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Complete application stack with VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Description: The name of the environment to create (e.g. development, staging, production)
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  SubnetAZs:
    Type: List<String>
    Default: [ 'us-east-1a', 'us-east-1b' ]
    Description: Availability zones for the subnets
  KeyPairName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 key pair to be used for SSH access

Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      CentOS7: ami-0c94181f6a6ba807d

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName} VPC"
  SubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !Split [ ',', !Ref SubnetAZs ] ]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  SubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !Split [ ',', !Ref SubnetAZs ] ]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
  VpcGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt [ InternetGateway, InternetGatewayId ]
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  Route:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VpcGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt [ InternetGateway, InternetGatewayId ]
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
  SubnetRouteTableAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
  SubnetRouteTableAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c94181f6a6ba807d
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeleteOnTermination: true
          DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeleteOnTermination: true
          DeviceIndex: 1
          SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      Engine: mysql
      DBName: mydb
      MasterUsername: root
      MasterUserPassword: passw0rd
      VPCSecurityGroups: [ !Ref EC2Instance ]
      MultiAZ: true
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-bucket
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${EnvironmentName} Load Balancer"
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Subnets:
        - Ref: SubnetA
        - Ref: SubnetB
      SecurityGroups: [ !Ref EC2Instance ]
